title: F1 Prediction System
description: An end-to-end ML pipeline predicting Formula 1 race winners using historic telemetry and Monte Carlo simulations.
longDescription: Built a predictive ecosystem combining XGBoost, Bayesian Inference, and Monte Carlo lap-by-lap physical simulations to predict race outcomes under the new 2026 ground-effect regulations.

title: LLM Multilingual Research
description: A deep dive into the structural inequality of Large Language Models for non-English scripts and tokenization cost analysis.
longDescription: Investigated the systematic disadvantage non-English languages face in LLM architectures, focusing on token fertility crises and economic taxes on low-resource scripts.

title: Cartograph
description: An interactive data visualization platform that transforms raw datasets into cinematic 3D maps.
longDescription: Powered by Three.js and D3.js, Cartograph turns complex CSVs into explorable 3D terrain maps with smooth camera-fly transitions and narrative overlays.
